a:r.a:t: Reliance on fragmented source data and manual files by site and job, in tandem with insufficient governance controls undermines control and scale
Real-time Commission Visibility for the payee

p:cNvPr.name: Picture 12
p:cNvPr.descr: Free Excel Icon Transparent, Download Free Excel Icon Transparent png ...

p:cNvPr.name: Picture 12
p:cNvPr.descr: Free Excel Icon Transparent, Download Free Excel Icon Transparent png ...

a:r.a:t: Homegrown Commission system: Bonus & Commission (Covers Agents only)
Limited SPM/ICM reporting capabilities; data is fragmented and pulled from multiple sources and then put into manual files to distribute
Cognos reporting is limited to Actuals (Sales results); patchwork is then required to have insightful data
Manual files are maintained by site and role, creating fragmented administration and inconsistent targets across the business

p:cNvPr.name: Picture 12
p:cNvPr.descr: Free Excel Icon Transparent, Download Free Excel Icon Transparent png ...

a:r.a:t: Values represent approximate counts of manual rate files
Payee data is split across manual excel rosters and the Bonus & Commission tool, which does not store historical data
Single file managed via comp ID in
